title: TaCZ Unlimited
description: A modpack of my hand picked TaCZ Addons along side TaCZ
body:
TaCZ Unlimited is a compilation of TaCZ Addons or other mods that I think compliment it well hand picked by me for an optimized online expirience. This modpack was created for a Minecraft realm im a part of. ("Shot Fired") does not currently work and will mneed to be disabled for now)

This modpack contains a variaty of TaCZ addons such as Daffa's Arsenal and TACtical Movement alongside some mods I thought would compliment it well such as Simple Voice Chat and Simple Planes. it also has mods adding the TPA and RTP commands that you see on servers.
